HERO.SUBTITLE: Three generations of passion. One extraordinary mango. Handpicked from our sun-blessed orchards in the Konkan coast.

ABOUT.TITLE: Our Legacy
ABOUT.SUBTITLE: Three generations of mango cultivation excellence
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: Since 1952, Nilkamal Agro Farms has been synonymous with premium quality Kesar mangoes. Our journey began in the fertile lands of Ratnagiri, Maharashtra, where the perfect climate and soil conditions create the world's finest mangoes.
ABOUT.PARA1: In 1952, our grandfather planted the first Alphonso saplings on the sun-drenched slopes of Pune. He believed that the finest mangoes come not from science alone, but from a deep reverence for the land, the seasons, and the ancient wisdom passed down through generations.
ABOUT.PARA2: Today, Nilkamal Agro Farms spans over 15 acres of heritage orchards. Every mango that leaves our farm carries the warmth of our soil, the sweetness of monsoon rains, and the love of a family that has dedicated its life to growing the king of fruits.
ABOUT.VALUE1_DESC: No pesticides, no shortcuts—only organic methods our ancestors trusted.
ABOUT.VALUE2_DESC: Every mango is touched by human hands, never machines, from tree to box.

JOURNEY.TITLE: The Sacred Lifecycle
JOURNEY.SUBTITLE: From Seed to
JOURNEY.DESCRIPTION: Witness the miraculous journey of our Kesar
JOURNEY.STAGE1_DESC: Selected from the finest Kesar mother trees, each seed carries within it seventy years of heritage genetics. Planted in our ancestral soil, blessed by the winter sun.
JOURNEY.STAGE2_DESC: A tender green shoot breaks through rich Pune earth. Our farmers watch over each sapling like a newborn child, shielding it from wind and excess rain.
JOURNEY.STAGE3_DESC: Roots reach deep into mineral-rich black soil. The sapling strengthens, its trunk thickening, leaves broadening to drink the coastal sun.
JOURNEY.STAGE4_DESC: A magnificent canopy unfolds. Our Kesar trees stand like royalty in the orchard — their dense crowns creating cathedral-like shade below.
JOURNEY.STAGE5_DESC: Thousands of tiny cream-white flowers burst into bloom, filling the orchard with intoxicating fragrance. Bees dance between blossoms in ancient pollination rituals.
JOURNEY.STAGE6_DESC: Firm, aromatic, vibrant green. The raw Kesar hangs heavy on the branch, already carrying the promise of its legendary sweetness. Patience rewards.
JOURNEY.STAGE7_DESC: Bathed in golden sunlight, the Kesar achieves its legendary saffron hue. The flesh turns to silk, the aroma becomes divine. The King of Fruits is crowned.

VARIETIES.TITLE: Our Royal Collection
VARIETIES.SUBTITLE: Each variety — a jewel in the crown of Indian mangoes
VARIETIES.KESAR_DESC: Named after saffron for its deep orange pulp. Intensely sweet with a hint of citrus and floral notes.

TESTIMONIALS.TITLE: Words of Honour
TESTIMONIALS.REVIEW1: The moment I opened the box, the aroma transported me straight to my grandmother's village in Konkan. These are not just mangoes — they are memories wrapped in gold.
TESTIMONIALS.REVIEW2: I have tasted Alphonso from many farms, but Nilkamal Farms is in a league of its own. The texture is like custard, the sweetness perfectly balanced. Truly the king of fruits.
TESTIMONIALS.REVIEW3: We ordered for our daughter's wedding. Every guest asked where we got these magnificent mangoes. The presentation, the freshness — absolutely impeccable service.
TESTIMONIALS.REVIEW4: As a chef, I am particular about ingredients. These Alphonsos have a depth of flavour — honeyed, floral, with a hint of saffron — that elevates every dessert I create with them.
TESTIMONIALS.REVIEW5: Three seasons running, we order exclusively from Nilkamal Farms. The consistency is remarkable. Every single mango is perfect. Our family won't accept anything else now.
TESTIMONIALS.REVIEW6: I sent a box to my parents in the US. They called in tears — said it tasted exactly like the mangoes from their childhood. Thank you for keeping this tradition alive.

SPECIAL.TITLE: What Sets Us Apart
SPECIAL.ROYAL_PROMISE_DESC: Every box that leaves our farm carries our family's honour. If any mango doesn't meet your expectations, we replace the entire order — no questions asked.
SPECIAL.FEATURE1_DESC: The unique microclimate of our Ratnagiri orchards — laterite soil, coastal humidity, and Sahyadri mountain winds — creates flavour no other region can replicate.
SPECIAL.FEATURE2_DESC: We never use carbide or artificial ripening. Each Alphonso ripens naturally on the tree and in traditional hay beds, developing its signature creamy texture.
SPECIAL.FEATURE3_DESC: Our trees descend from saplings selected seventy years ago for exceptional sweetness, aroma, and that unmistakable saffron colour inside.
SPECIAL.FEATURE4_DESC: Every batch is certified free of pesticide residue. We share lab reports with every order because transparency is our tradition.
SPECIAL.FEATURE5_DESC: Mangoes are harvested at dawn, graded by hand, wrapped in tissue, and dispatched the very same day to preserve peak freshness.
SPECIAL.FEATURE6_DESC: We don't just pack mangoes — we include handwritten notes, recipe cards, and our family's story. Because every box is a gift from our home to yours.

FARM_TO_HOME.TITLE: The Royal Passage
FARM_TO_HOME.CTA_TEXT: From tree to your doorstep in under a week. That's the Nilkamal Farms promise.
FARM_TO_HOME.STEP1_DESC: Our farmers hand-pick only the finest mangoes at first light, when the fruit is coolest and freshest.
FARM_TO_HOME.STEP2_DESC: Each mango is individually inspected, graded by size, colour, and aroma. Only the top 20% earn the Nilkamal Farms seal.
FARM_TO_HOME.STEP3_DESC: Wrapped lovingly in soft tissue paper and nestled in hay-lined boxes — the way our grandmother used to pack them.
FARM_TO_HOME.STEP4_DESC: Temperature-controlled transport from Ratnagiri to major cities. We never break the cold chain.
FARM_TO_HOME.STEP5_DESC: Delivered to your home with a freshness guarantee, a handwritten note from our family, and recipe suggestions.

POPUP.TITLE: Order Fresh Mangoes
POPUP.SUBTITLE: Get the finest Alphonso mangoes delivered to your doorstep
